rov_teknologi.title: French Suffren-class submarine launches and recovers U.S. Navy UUV
rov_teknologi.summary:
Between March 16 and 20, 2026, a French Navy (Marine Nationale) Suffren-class nuclear attack submarine (SSN) successfully launched and recovered a U.S. Navy Razorback underwater drone for the first time. These technical trials took place off the coast of Toulon, France’s main naval base. They mark a significant step in the capabilities of the Suffren-class ...
The post French Suffren-class submarine launches and recovers U.S. Navy UUV appeared first on Naval News.
